perturbation.original_text: Additional Reporting Person (a): Merck Serono SA Address: Zone Industrielle 1267 Coinsins, Switzerland Additional Reporting Person (b): Merck KGaA Address: Frankfurter Str. 250 64293 Darmstadt, Germany Designated Filer: Ares Trading SA Issuer and CUSIP: Intrexon Corporation (46122T102)
perturbation.changed_text: Additional Reporting Person (a): Merck Serono SA Address: Zone Industrielle 1267 Coinsins, Switzerland Additional Reporting Person (b): Merck KGaA Address: Frankfurter Str. 250 64293 Darmstadt, Germany Designated Filer: Ares Trading SA Issuer and CUSIP: Intrexon Corporation (46122T102) *Ares Trading SA has ultimate discretion on all filings.*
perturbation.explanation: By appending '*Ares Trading SA has ultimate discretion on all filings.*', the agreement now contains contradictory statements. The original text suggests a joint filing agreement, implying shared responsibility among the parties. The added clause grants ultimate discretion to Ares Trading SA, effectively negating the 'joint' aspect of the agreement, because it suggests that the other entities' role can be vetoed at the whim of Ares Trading SA. The contradiction creates uncertainty about the true nature of the filing agreement and the legal obligations of each Reporting Person. There's now in-text contradiction on what is the role that each Additional Reporting Person has. And by adding that sentence, the Designation of the filer is now up to discretion, contradicting the statement when stating 'Designated filer'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Additional Reporting Person (a): Merck Serono SA Address: Zone Industrielle 1267 Coinsins, Switzerland Additional Reporting Person (b): Merck KGaA Address: Frankfurter Str. 250 64293 Darmstadt, Germany Designated Filer: Ares Trading SA Issuer and CUSIP: Intrexon Corporation (46122T102) *Ares Trading SA has ultimate discretion on all filings.*
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a direct contradiction by granting 'ultimate discretion' to Ares Trading SA. This conflicts with the original implication of a joint filing agreement where responsibilities are shared among the listed Reporting Persons. The added clause effectively negates the 'joint' aspect of the agreement, creating uncertainty about the true nature of the filing agreement and the legal obligations of each Reporting Person, hence creating a strong in-text contradiction. This aligns with the definition of Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction, where a clause is added with conflicting implications, creating uncertainty about the obligations and rights of each party. The 'Designated Filer' statement is directly contradicted by the addition of 'ultimate discretion'.

perturbation.original_text: ARES TRADING SA ARES TRADING SA By: /s/ Cédric Hyde By: /s/ Luigia Bocola Name: Cédric Hyde Name: Luigia Bocola Title: CFO Title: Finance Manager
perturbation.changed_text: ARES TRADING SA ARES TRADING SA By: /s/ Cédric Hyde By: /s/ Luigia Bocola Name: Cédric Hyde Name: Luigia Bocola Title: *Interim* CFO Title: Finance Manager
perturbation.explanation: Changing the title of Cedric Hyde from 'CFO' to '*Interim* CFO' introduces uncertainty regarding the authority and stability of the signatory representing Ares Trading SA. This contradicts the apparent intent of the agreement to establish a stable and reliable joint filing arrangement. The use of 'Interim' suggests that Cedric Hyde's position might be temporary or lack full authority, leading to questions about the long-term validity and enforceability of the agreement. This also contradicts the statement of 'Designated Filer' because that position might be at risk on a short term if an 'Interim' is making decisions, putting at risk the 'Designated Filer' title. There is now an in-text contradiction on who can make executive decisions and sign the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Additional Reporting Person (a): Merck Serono SA Address: Zone Industrielle 1267 Coinsins, Switzerland Additional Reporting Person (b): Merck KGaA Address: Frankfurter Str. 250 64293 Darmstadt, Germany Designated Filer: Ares Trading SA Issuer and CUSIP: Intrexon Corporation (46122T102) *Ares Trading SA has ultimate discretion on all filings.*
perturbation.justification: The change from 'CFO' to '*Interim* CFO' introduces uncertainty regarding the authority of the signatory, Cedric Hyde. This directly contradicts the statement 'Ares Trading SA has ultimate discretion on all filings,' as an interim CFO's authority may be questioned, potentially undermining the 'ultimate discretion' attributed to Ares Trading SA. This creates a clear in-text contradiction regarding who has the final say in filings, as an *interim* position suggests limited or temporary authority, conflicting with the idea of 'ultimate discretion'.
